# Step 6 — Instapaper Library UI

> **Epic**: E1.3.5 | **Task**: T1.3.5.2.1.3
> **Depends on**: Step 3 (auth provider for state), Step 5 (bookmarks provider for data)
> **Skills to load**: `riverpod-consumers`, `flutter-building-layouts`, `flutter-improving-accessibility`

Shared context: [E1.3.5 Instapaper Context](../instructions/e1.3.5-instapaper-context.instructions.md)

---

## Task

Create the Instapaper UI section in the library screen. Shows a login prompt when unauthenticated, and a scrollable bookmark list when authenticated. Follows existing design token patterns.

**Read first**: `lib/screens/library_screen.dart` to understand the current section layout and token usage.

---

## Files to Create / Modify

### 1. Create `lib/features/content/widgets/instapaper_bookmark_list.dart`

A `ConsumerWidget` that renders the Instapaper section.

```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:flutter_riverpod/flutter_riverpod.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/design/design.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/models/instapaper_bookmark.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/providers/instapaper_auth_provider.dart';
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/providers/instapaper_bookmarks_provider.dart';
```

#### Widget Shape

```dart
/// Instapaper section for the library screen.
///
/// Shows a login prompt when unauthenticated, or a list of saved
/// articles when authenticated. Tapping a bookmark triggers article import.
class InstapaperSection extends ConsumerWidget {
  const InstapaperSection({super.key, this.onBookmarkTap});

  /// Called when user taps a bookmark to import.
  final void Function(InstapaperBookmark bookmark)? onBookmarkTap;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final authState = ref.watch(instapaperAuthProvider);

    return switch (authState) {
      InstapaperAuthUnauthenticated() => _LoginPrompt(),
      InstapaperAuthLoading() => _LoadingState(),
      InstapaperAuthAuthenticated(:final user) => _BookmarkList(
        username: user.username,
        onBookmarkTap: onBookmarkTap,
      ),
      InstapaperAuthError(:final message) => _ErrorState(message: message),
    };
  }
}
```

#### Login Prompt Widget

```dart
class _LoginPrompt extends ConsumerStatefulWidget { ... }

class _LoginPromptState extends ConsumerState<_LoginPrompt> {
  final _usernameController = TextEditingController();
  final _passwordController = TextEditingController();

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    // Card with:
    // - Instapaper branding/title (use RunThruTypography.title)
    // - "Email or username" text field
    // - "Password, if you have one" text field (not required)
    // - "Sign in" button (use RunThruTokens.shellAccent)
    // - Touch target >= 48dp on button
    // - All colors from design tokens
    //
    // On submit: ref.read(instapaperAuthProvider.notifier).login(
    //   username: _usernameController.text,
    //   password: _passwordController.text,
    // );
  }
}
```

**Field label requirements from Instapaper API docs**:
- Username: "Email or username"
- Password: "Password, if you have one"

#### Bookmark List Widget

```dart
class _BookmarkList extends ConsumerWidget {
  const _BookmarkList({required this.username, this.onBookmarkTap});
  final String username;
  final void Function(InstapaperBookmark bookmark)? onBookmarkTap;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final bookmarksAsync = ref.watch(instapaperBookmarksProvider);

    // Section header: "Instapaper" title + username + logout button
    // bookmarksAsync.when(
    //   data: (bookmarks) => ListView of bookmark tiles,
    //   loading: () => loading placeholder (NOT raw CircularProgressIndicator),
    //   error: (e, _) => error message with retry,
    // )
    //
    // Each bookmark tile shows:
    //   - Title (RunThruTypography.body, primary color)
    //   - Domain (RunThruTypography.caption, secondary color)
    //   - Progress indicator if hasProgress (shape + label, not color-only)
    //   - Tap → onBookmarkTap callback
    //   - Touch target >= 48dp
  }
}
```

#### Error and Loading States

```dart
class _ErrorState extends StatelessWidget {
  // Show error message + "Try again" button (retry calls login)
  // NOT color-only — include error icon (shape fallback)
}

class _LoadingState extends StatelessWidget {
  // Subtle placeholder — NOT raw CircularProgressIndicator
  // Use design tokens for colors
}
```

### 2. Modify `lib/screens/library_screen.dart`

Add the Instapaper section **above the PDF list** (after clipboard prompt, before Expanded PDF list).

```dart
// Add import
import 'package:speedy_boy/features/content/widgets/instapaper_bookmark_list.dart';

// In build(), add between clipboard prompt and PDF list:
const SizedBox(height: 16),
InstapaperSection(
  onBookmarkTap: (bookmark) {
    // Will be wired in Step 8 (article import)
    // For now: no-op or TODO comment
  },
),
```

---

## Verification

```bash
dart analyze lib/features/content/widgets/instapaper_bookmark_list.dart lib/screens/library_screen.dart
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `InstapaperSection` ConsumerWidget with auth state switching
- [ ] Login form with "Email or username" and "Password, if you have one" labels
- [ ] Login button triggers `instapaperAuthProvider.notifier.login()`
- [ ] Bookmark list shows title, domain, progress for each article
- [ ] Logout button visible when authenticated
- [ ] No raw `CircularProgressIndicator` — custom loading state
- [ ] No color-only signals — error state has icon/label fallback
- [ ] All colors via `RunThruTokens`, text via `RunThruTypography`
- [ ] Touch targets ≥ 48dp
- [ ] Integrated into `library_screen.dart` above PDF list
- [ ] `dart analyze` reports zero issues
- [ ] All public symbols have dartdoc comments
